transcript_facts:
- [Assessment] and then in terms of the kidney stones , i know that you had those a couple years ago , as well .
- [Assessment] and for your last problem your kidney stones , uh , i think everything seems to be fine right at this time .
- [Findings] so , stephanie is a 49-year-old female with a past medical history significant for congestive heart failure , kidney stones and prior colonoscopy who presents today for an abnormal lab finding . so , stephanie , i called you in today because your hemoglobin is low .
- [Findings] and i know that we have ordered some labs on you before the visit . and it did , it c- you know , your , your , your hemoglobin is your red blood cell count .
- [Findings] i did about three years ago , um , and i did a colonoscopy for that , but nothing since then .
- [Findings] so , you know , let's talk a little bit about that colonoscopy . i know you had a colonoscopy about three years ago and that showed that you had some mild diverticuli- diverticulosis .
- [Findings] and then i know that , uh , you know , you have this slightly reduced heart function , you know , your congestive heart failure .
- [Findings] well , i'm gon na go ahead and do a quick physical exam , okay ? hey , dragon , show me the vital signs . so , here in the office today , your vital signs look great . your blood pressure is fine . your heart rates r- right where it should be , which is good , okay ? i'm just gon na do a quick exam .
- [Findings] so , your physical , physical examination looks fine . so , on your heart exam , i do hear a three out of six systolic ejection murmur , which we've heard in the past , okay ?
- [Findings] hey , dragon , show me the echocardiogram . so , i just wanted to go over the results of your last echocardiogram , that was about six months ago . that shows that you do have the low pumping function of , of your heart at about 45 % , which is not terrible . and it does show that you have some moderate mitral regurgitation . hey , dragon , show me the hemoglobin . and here , this is the hemoglobin that i was referring to .
- [Findings] so , for you first problem this new anemia , uh , i wan na go ahead and send off some more labs and anemia profile , just to see exactly what type of anemia we're dealing with . i also wan na go and refer you back to the gastroenterologist for another evaluation , okay ? so , they're gon na do , uh , probably do an endoscopy and another colonoscopy on you . um , but again , i wan na send off those labs just to make sure that it's not something else , okay ?
- [History of Present Illness] um , so i know the nurse talked to you about dax .
- [History of Present Illness] over the past couple of months , i've been really tired and dizzy .
- [History of Present Illness] so , have you noticed any blood in your stools ?
- [History of Present Illness] and how about , you know , do your stools look dark or tarry or black or anything like that ?
- [History of Present Illness] and have you been , um , having any heavy menstrual bleeding or anything like that ?
- [History of Present Illness] any weight loss ? no , no weight loss or passing out . i have felt a bit dizzy , but it has n't l- led to me passing out at all . so , you endorse some dizziness . you endorse some fatigue . have you , but you have n't had any weight loss , loss of appetite , anything like that ?
- [History of Present Illness] um , no issues since then ? nope , no issues since then .
- [History of Present Illness] i've noticed some swelling in my , my legs .
- [History of Present Illness] and any shortness of breath or problems lying flat at night , anything like that ?
- [History of Present Illness] have you had any , any back pain , flank pain , anything like that ?
- [History of Present Illness] any blood in your urine that you've seen ?
- [History of Present Illness] and we've just talked a lot about your , your s- your symptoms , you know , your dizziness , your fatigue and that type of thing . anything else that i might have missed , fever chills , any nasal congestion , sore throat , cough ? uh , i've had a little bit of nasal congestion just because with the seasons changing , i , i get seasonal allergies .
- [History of Present Illness] and on your lower extremities , i do notice some trace to one plus pitting edema in your ankles , which is probably from the salt intake , okay ?
- [History of Present Illness] so , that's that slight heart murmur i heard in your exam , okay ?
- [History of Present Illness] for your next problem your congestive heart failure , um , i do think you're retaining a little bit of fluid .
- [History of Present Illness] and as well your , as well , as your lisinopril 10 milligrams a day .
- [History of Present Illness] 'cause i might need to give you more diuretic .
- [History of Present Illness] um , and i know that might be a little difficult with the diuretic , but do your best .
- [Plan] so , i'm gon na go ahead and start you on some lasix 40 milligrams once a day . i want you to continue you on your toprol 50 milligrams daily .
